prompt: I just closed a bunch of bd issues this sprint and merged 3 PRs. The README.md is getting long — can you sync the docs and make sure everything's in order? Use sync-docs.

assertions.description: Ran context_gatherer.py and reported bd closed issues or merged PRs from the output
assertions.check: result.md mentions context_gatherer or bd closed issues or merged PRs with specific data

assertions.description: Ran doc_structure_analyzer.py and used its output to identify doc issues
assertions.check: result.md references MISSING, STALE, EXTRACTABLE, or BLOATED status from the analyzer

assertions.description: Produced at least one concrete recommendation or action (not just a vague summary)
assertions.check: result.md names a specific file (e.g. docs/hooks.md) or section with a specific next step

assertions.description: Used the skill scripts rather than just reading files manually
assertions.check: result.md shows script execution output, not just manual file reading
